gap_summaries: [ultrathink] FIXED: Existing tests already cover 30+ scenarios; plan redundancy identified. Added baseline measurement task (Task 1.3) to verify existing coverage before adding new tests.
[ultrathink] FIXED: JSON key ordering assumption not explicitly documented. Added Task 1 commentary on Python 3.7+ dict ordering guarantee and dataclass field preservation.
[ultrathink] FIXED: Byte-equality testing for UnknownEvent missing null-value coverage. Added Task 7 Step 3 (test_unknown_event_with_null_values_req09) to validate null round-trips.
[ultrathink] FIXED: Escaped JSON characters test (Task 3) did not verify round-trip behavior explicitly. Enhanced Step 3 with detailed assertion comparing original vs reserialized JSON.

[ultrathink] FIXED: Cross-Python-version determinism requirement present in spec (3.11, 3.12, 3.13, 3.14) but not testable via single-version test execution. Documented in Task 11 acceptance report that multi-version validation occurs at CI time.
